name: AWS Project Rainier
notes: 22-building campus near New Carlisle. Groundbreaking Sep 2024, first buildings 2025.

name: AWS Northwest Indiana Expansion
notes: 2.4 GW expansion across NW Indiana. Announced Nov 2025.

name: AWS Madison County Mega Site
notes: Two complexes on 1700 acres near Canton/Ridgeland. Completion 2027.

name: AWS Warren County
notes: Second MS data center announced Nov 2025.

name: AWS DeSoto TX
notes: Ezell Drive Campus, 30,000 sqft in DeSoto.

name: AWS Comanche Peak (Project Spectrum)
notes: Large campus near Comanche Peak nuclear plant. Announced Dec 2025.

name: AWS AmeriPlex at the Port
notes: Existing facility in Portage, IN.

name: Google Midlothian
notes: Google Cloud us-south1 region. Midlothian campus.

name: Google Council Bluffs
notes: Two campuses, 900+ on-site employees. us-central1 region.

name: Google Papillion
notes: Campus in Papillion, 120+ employees.

name: Google Bridgeport AL
notes: Campus in Bridgeport, 100+ on-site employees.

name: Google Texas $40B Expansion
notes: $40B AI data center investment in Texas through 2027.

name: Meta Fort Worth
notes: Operational since 2015, 300+ jobs.

name: Meta Temple
notes: Operational since 2022.

name: Meta El Paso
notes: Broke ground 2025, ~100 operational jobs.

name: Meta Hyperion (Monroe, LA)
notes: 5 GW campus on 2,250 acres. JV with Blue Owl Capital. Construction began Dec 2024, completion 2030.

name: Meta Richland Parish LA
notes: Broke ground 2024, 500+ operational jobs.

name: Meta Lebanon IN
notes: 1 GW campus. Broke ground 2026.

name: Meta Altoona IA
notes: Operational since 2013, 400+ jobs.

name: Meta Rosemount MN
notes: Broke ground 2024, ~100 operational jobs.

name: Microsoft Mount Pleasant WI
notes: 1,575 acres. Phase 1 completion 2025-26. Zero-water evaporation cooling.

name: Microsoft Granger IN
notes: Planned data center.

name: Microsoft La Porte IN
notes: Planned data center.

name: OpenAI/Oracle Stargate (Abilene)
notes: 1 GW+ campus, first of 5-10 sites. Completion end of 2026.

name: xAI Colossus (Memphis)
notes: Operational AI supercomputer cluster in Memphis.

name: xAI MACROHADRR (Southaven)
notes: Expanding to ~2 GW. Purchased Dec 2025.

name: Apple Waukee IA
notes: Expanding from 360K sqft to 1.9M sqft.

name: Compass Meridian Campus
notes: Eight 250K sqft buildings, 40 MW each. 500 MW from Mississippi Power. Completion 2033.

name: AVAIO Brandon MS
notes: Sustainable data center announced Aug 2025.

name: Vantage Frontier (DFW)
notes: 768-acre DFW campus, 200 MW IT, 1.8 GW switchyard.

name: DataBank Red Oak TX
notes: 292-acre campus, 480 MW.

name: HyperGrid Campus (Amarillo)
notes: 5,800 acres, 18M sqft. First 1 GW by end 2026. Nuclear complex planned.

name: Data City (Laredo)
notes: 5 GW planned campus near Laredo.

name: Tract Caldwell County Park
notes: 1,515-acre, 2 GW technology park between Austin and San Antonio.

name: Lighthouse Campus (Port Washington)
notes: Megacampus collaboration. One of most ambitious AI builds in Midwest.

name: Google West Memphis AR
notes: Broke ground across river from xAI Colossus.

name: AWS Louisiana
notes: First AWS data center campuses in Louisiana. Announced 2025.

name: Provident/PowerHouse San Antonio
notes: West Military Drive & Loop 1604. Q2 2025 occupancy.
